Madame Web (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,817,106Details
International Box Office $56,481,711
Worldwide Box Office $100,298,817
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,052,100
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,099,884
Total $3,151,984
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Madame Web is a clairvoyant whose psychic abilities allow her to see within the spider world itself. This is the story of how she came to be.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,335,860 (35.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,013 opening theaters/4,013 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,335,336

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
February 14th, 2024 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
February 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Portugal)
February 14th, 2024 (Wide), released as Madam Web (Czech Republic)
February 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
February 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: March 15th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence/action and language.
(Rating bulletin 2819 (cert #53896), 1/31/2024)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Franchise: Sony’s Marvel Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, F-Rated, Triple
Filming location (city or town): New York, NY
Filming location (country): Mexico, United States
Filming location (state or county): Massachusetts, United States, New York, United States
Plot point: Origin Story, Paralysis, Psychics, Wheelchair User, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Marvel Entertainment, di Bonaventura Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
